description: Move coderef-core from DASHBOARD/packages/coderef-core to standalone CODEREF/coderef-core location. The tool is self-contained with its own package.json, build system, and CLI binaries. This separates the core scanning/parsing tool from the dashboard application.
goal: Separate coderef-core as a standalone tool in its own repository location, independent of the dashboard monorepo structure
requirements: Copy coderef-core from DASHBOARD/packages/coderef-core to CODEREF/coderef-core
Update MCP server configurations to reference new path
Verify standalone build and test work

success_criteria.build: npm run build passes in new location
success_criteria.mcp: MCP servers can still execute coderef-core CLI tools
success_criteria.workspace: Dashboard builds without coderef-core in workspaces
